title: CLAUDE.md
text: file provides guidance Claude Code (claude.ai/code) working code repository.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: mrgsim.ds Apache Arrow-backed simulation output package mrgsolve. stores simulation outputs Parquet files disk (tempdir()) rather -memory data frames, dramatically reducing memory footprint large pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic simulations enabling high-performance summarization via dplyr verbs.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: via make repo root: Run single test file R:
code: make doc        # Regenerate roxygen documentation (run after editing @-tags) make test       # Run testthat tests make check      # R CMD check (skips vignettes) make build      # Build package tarball make install    # Install from tarball make readme     # Render README.Rmd → README.md testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-own.R")

title: CLAUDE.md
text: central object data frame — ’s lightweight environment fields: - $ds — Arrow Dataset (lazy pointer parquet files disk) - $files — paths parquet files - $hash — xxh3_64 hashes files (used ownership system) - $pid — process ID object created - $gc — whether files auto-deleted GC finalization - $mod — mrgsolve model object produced simulation

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Two package-level hash environments (hash2addr, hash2file) map file hashes object memory addresses. “owner” file can move delete . Ownership transfers via take_ownership() / disown(). Files auto-delete GC owned. prevents accidental deletion objects copied passed contexts.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Objects track $pid (creation process). Arrow Dataset pointers become invalid across forked processes. refresh_ds() rebuilds pointer file paths. GC finalizer runs original process avoid double-deletes parallel simulations.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: .global environment holds package-wide constants state: - file.prefix — "mrgsims-ds-" (prefix parquet files) - file.re — regex identify package-managed files - nullptr — sentinel externalptr used detect invalidated Arrow pointers - trashcan — subdirectory tempdir() used staging area file deletion Option mrgsim.ds.show.gc (set via options()) prints messages GC removes files — useful debugging ownership/cleanup issues.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Parquet files written tempdir() pattern: e.g., mrgsims-ds-out2-0001.parquet
code: mrgsims-ds-{id}-{index}.parquet

title: Get Started
text: mrgsim.ds provides Apache Arrow-backed simulation output object mrgsolve, greatly reducing memory footprint large simulations providing high-performance pipeline summarizing huge simulation outputs. arrow-based simulation output objects R claim ownership files disk. files automatically removed owning object goes scope becomes subject R garbage collector. “anonymous”, parquet-formatted files hold data tempdir() working R, functions provided move data permanent locations later use.

title: Get Started
text: Load model using mread_ds() friends. model almost identical model loaded mread(); just extra information included model object make sure works well mrgsim.ds approach. functions can use load model include mcode_ds() modlib_ds() house_ds() mread_cache_ds() mimic corresponding functions mrgsolve.
code: mod <- mread_ds("popex-2.mod", outvars = "IPRED, DV, ECL")

title: Get Started
text: simulate, call mrgsim_ds(); arguments get passed mrgsim(). output behaves similarly regular mrgsim() output.  owns file contains simulated data. object environment therefore modified reference. want make copy object, use copy_ds(). can specify object files copy.

title: Get Started
text: mrgsim.ds provides access points dplyr / arrow data wrangling pipelines. Note must call collect() as_tibble() order realize summarized results. See Arrow documentation details Arrow pipelines. now, note want exact quantile summaries (including median), convert duckdb object. cheap easy as_duckdb_ds() function. want get simulated data R data frame, simply coerce tibble. want arrow data set object: want arrow table object:
code: out %>%    filter(TIME == 5*24) %>%    select(TIME, dose, IPRED) %>%    group_by(dose) %>%    summarise(      Min = min(IPRED),      Mean = mean(IPRED),      Max = max(IPRED),      .groups = "drop"   ) %>% collect() ## # A tibble: 3 × 4 ##    dose   Min  Mean   Max ##   <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> ## 1   100  2.02  3.39  4.97 ## 2   300  5.70 10.6  17.9  ## 3   700  7.29 18.6  41.4 out %>%    as_duckdb_ds() %>%    filter(TIME == 5*24) %>%    select(TIME, dose, IPRED) %>%    group_by(dose) %>%    summarise(      P5 = quantile(IPRED, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),      Mean = mean(IPRED),      Median = median(IPRED),     P95 = quantile(IPRED, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),      .groups = "drop"   ) %>% collect() ## Warning: Missing values are always removed in SQL aggregation functions. ## Use `na.rm = TRUE` to silence this warning ## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours. ## # A tibble: 3 × 5 ##    dose    P5  Mean Median   P95 ##   <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> ## 1   100  2.03  3.39   3.42  4.97 ## 2   700  7.93 18.6   16.8  35.8  ## 3   300  6.74 10.6   10.3  15.5 as_tibble(out) ## # A tibble: 7,260 × 6 ##       ID  TIME    ECL IPRED    DV  dose ##    <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> ##  1     1   0   -0.140 0     0       100 ##  2     1   0   -0.140 0     0       100 ##  3     1   0.5 -0.140 0.749 0.749   100 ##  4     1   1   -0.140 1.27  1.27    100 ##  5     1   1.5 -0.140 1.62  1.62    100 ##  6     1   2   -0.140 1.86  1.86    100 ##  7     1   2.5 -0.140 2.01  2.01    100 ##  8     1   3   -0.140 2.12  2.12    100 ##  9     1   3.5 -0.140 2.18  2.18    100 ## 10     1   4   -0.140 2.22  2.22    100 ## # ℹ 7,250 more rows as_arrow_ds(out) ## FileSystemDataset with 1 Parquet file ## 6 columns ## ID: double ## TIME: double ## ECL: double ## IPRED: double ## DV: double ## dose: double ##  ## See $metadata for additional Schema metadata arrow::as_arrow_table(out) ## Table ## 7260 rows x 6 columns ## $ID <double> ## $TIME <double> ## $ECL <double> ## $IPRED <double> ## $DV <double> ## $dose <double> ##  ## See $metadata for additional Schema metadata

title: Get Started
text: mrgsim.ds provides utilities working lists output objects typically realized simulating replicates parallel. 10 simulation replicates. used lapply(), result list simulation output objects ’d like work simulations single object. , use reduce_ds() leaves backing files , creates single object now holds single pointer 10 files.
code: out <- lapply(1:10, \(x) mrgsim_ds(mod, data)) class(out) ## [1] "list" out <- reduce_ds(out)

title: Get Started
text: last simulation, created list output objects reduced list single object outputs held 10 parquet files. can see files tempdir(). get list files R character vector: save outputs persistent location, use save_ds(). creates .rds file holding (lightweight) simulation output object relocates backing files save_dir. read simulations back R: alternative rename move. want simulated data output single parquet file name locate.
code: list_temp() ## 10 files [2.9 Mb] ## - mrgsims-ds-1bbd10b4be8e.parquet ## - mrgsims-ds-1bbd204e628a.parquet ##    ... ## - mrgsims-ds-1bbd5dd1b150.parquet ## - mrgsims-ds-1bbd6a9e985.parquet files_ds(out) ##  [1] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd3cb565a2.parquet" ##  [2] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd204e628a.parquet" ##  [3] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd10b4be8e.parquet" ##  [4] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd56a55833.parquet" ##  [5] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd2bd147d7.parquet" ##  [6] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd5dd1b150.parquet" ##  [7] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd2fde8bb0.parquet" ##  [8] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd6a9e985.parquet"  ##  [9] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd29263da7.parquet" ## [10] "/tmp/RtmpCw7sHd/mrgsims-ds-1bbd32f1529f.parquet" save_ds(out, file = file.path(save_dir, "sims.rds")) bah <- read_ds(file.path(save_dir, "sims.rds"))  bah ## Model: popex-2_mod ## Dim  : 144.6K x 5 ## Files: 10 [2.9 Mb] ## Owner: yes (no gc) ##     ID TIME        ECL    IPRED       DV ## 1:   1  0.0 -0.0317765 0.000000 0.000000 ## 2:   1  0.0 -0.0317765 0.000000 0.000000 ## 3:   1  0.5 -0.0317765 1.851493 1.851493 ## 4:   1  1.0 -0.0317765 2.833834 2.833834 ## 5:   1  1.5 -0.0317765 3.338411 3.338411 ## 6:   1  2.0 -0.0317765 3.580684 3.580684 ## 7:   1  2.5 -0.0317765 3.679257 3.679257 ## 8:   1  3.0 -0.0317765 3.699414 3.699414 rename_ds(bah, "regimen-1") move_ds(bah, save_dir) ## ℹ 10 files are now located in /tmp/RtmpCw7sHd; gc is off. write_parquet_ds(x = bah, sink = "new/path/file.parquet")

title: Get Started
text: new simulation output object created, object owns files , default, files deleted soon object goes scope. files deleted R garbage collector called. can see owns files marked garbage collection appropriate. Let’s blow away check files. can ask mrgsim.ds notify file gc called. won’t see message output vignette, can confirm R session. can prevent file gc removing files. Now, files remain object goes scope. remember , example, files still tempdir() blown away R restarts. really want keep output files safe, ’s best use save_ds(), move_ds(), write_parquet_ds() relocate files tempdir(), also disabling file garbage collection.

Mean: double . n: int64 .  . * Sorted by time [asc] . See $.data for the source Arrow object collect(dd) . # A tibble: 481 × 3 .     time  Mean     n .    <dbl> <dbl> <int> .  1   0    0     6000 .  2   0.5  1.08  3000 .  3   1    1.77  3000 .  4   1.5  2.23  3000 .  5   2    2.54  3000 .  6   2.5  2.75  3000 .  7   3    2.90  3000 .  8   3.5  3.00  3000 .  9   4    3.06  3000 . 10   4.5  3.09  3000 . # ℹ 471 more rows

title: Apache Arrow Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for mrgsolve
text: workflow particularly useful running replicate simulations parallel, large outputs Now 10x number rows (14.5M), little change object size.
code: library(future.apply, quietly = TRUE)  plan(multisession, workers = 5L)  out2 <- future_lapply(1:10, \(x) { mrgsim_ds(mod, data) }, future.seed = TRUE)  out2 <- reduce_ds(out2)  plan(sequential) out2 . Model: popex . Dim  : 14.5M x 4 . Files: 10 [131.8 Mb] . Owner: yes (gc) .     ID time       CL    IPRED . 1:   1  0.0 1.668907 0.000000 . 2:   1  0.0 1.668907 0.000000 . 3:   1  0.5 1.668907 1.389168 . 4:   1  1.0 1.668907 2.164311 . 5:   1  1.5 1.668907 2.580709 . 6:   1  2.0 1.668907 2.787935 . 7:   1  2.5 1.668907 2.873612 . 8:   1  3.0 1.668907 2.889060 lobstr::obj_size(out2) . 296.81 kB

what: Files on disk are automagically managed
title: Apache Arrow Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for mrgsolve
text: arrow files stored tempdir() parquet format directory eventually removed R session ends. Tools provided manage space. also put finalizer object , goes scope, files automatically cleaned . First, run bunch simulations. 12 files holding simulation outputs. Now, remove one objects containing 10 files. soon garbage collector called, leftover files cleaned .
code: list_temp() . 11 files [145 Mb] . - mrgsims-ds-d6833c771dfc.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-d6ca42ea1ca.parquet .    ... . - mrgsims-ds-d6ce5c630542.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-d6ce754e2128.parquet rm(out2) rm(out)  plan(multisession, workers = 5L)  out1 <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data) rename_ds(out1, "out1")  out2 <- future_lapply(1:10, \(x) { mrgsim_ds(mod, data) }, future.seed = TRUE)  out2 <- reduce_ds(out2) rename_ds(out2, "out2")  out3 <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data)  rename_ds(out3, "out3")  plan(sequential) list_temp() . 12 files [158.2 Mb] . - mrgsims-ds-out1-1.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-out2-01.parquet .    ... . - mrgsims-ds-out2-10.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-out3-1.parquet rm(out2) gc() .           used  (Mb) gc trigger  (Mb) limit (Mb) max used  (Mb) . Ncells 2142581 114.5    3811248 203.6         NA  3630808 194.0 . Vcells 3931312  30.0   16570059 126.5      16384 22218633 169.6  list_temp() . 2 files [26.4 Mb] . - mrgsims-ds-out1-1.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-out3-1.parquet

title: Apache Arrow Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for mrgsolve
text: mrgsim.ds tracks tempdir() location process ID (via Sys.getpid()) R process model loaded. simulation outputs saved file, save location always tempdir() parent R process. simulating parallel, likely different call tempdir() says worker node. time simulations saved, current R process id (pid) saved simulation output object. parallel simulation case, different pid parent R process, saved model object. finalizer function simulation object removes output files disk object goes scope run finalizer called parent R process determined Sys.getpid().

what: Coerce an mrgsims object to 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed mrgsimsds object — as_mrgsim_ds
title: Coerce an mrgsims object to 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed mrgsimsds object — as_mrgsim_ds
text: Converts output mrgsolve::mrgsim() mrgsimsds object writing simulation data parquet file tempdir(). Files tempdir() auto-deleted garbage collection default. Use move_ds() save_ds() relocate files outside tempdir(), automatically disables gc, call gc_ds() control gc directly.

title: Coerce an mrgsims object to 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed mrgsimsds object — as_mrgsim_ds

title: Coerce an mrgsims object to 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed mrgsimsds object — as_mrgsim_ds
text: x mrgsims object. verbose TRUE, print progress information console. gc initial gc setting; TRUE, finalizer function attempt remove files object scope. value locked: move_ds() save_ds() automatically adjust gc based whether files remain tempdir(). lock gc setting prevent automatic adjustment, call gc_ds() creation.

what: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
text: Controls whether underlying parquet files automatically deleted object garbage collected (value) whether message issued deletion occurs (notify). Set value = FALSE protect files cleanup; set back TRUE re-enable automatic deletion. notify flag intended debugging ; mrgsim.ds.show.gc option provides behavior package-wide. Calling gc_ds() value locks gc setting: value explicitly set, package never automatically change files moved written. warning issued gc locked TRUE files moved outside tempdir(), since files auto-deleted garbage collection.

title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
code: gc_ds(x, value = NULL, notify = NULL, ...)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' gc_ds(x, value = NULL, notify = NULL, ...)  # S3 method for class 'list' gc_ds(x, value = NULL, notify = NULL, ...)

title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object list objects. value logical; TRUE underlying files deleted garbage collection. Passing value also locks gc setting subsequent file operations (see move_ds()) automatically adjust . notify logical; TRUE message issued files deleted garbage collection. debugging ; see also mrgsim.ds.show.gc option. ... used.

title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object, returned invisibly gc /gc_notify updated. x list, returned invisibly gc_ds() applied every mrgsimsds element; non-mrgsimsds elements left unchanged.

title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
code: mod <- modlib_ds("popex", outvars = "IPRED") #> Building popex ...  #> done.  data <- ev_expand(amt = 100, ID = 1:5)  out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data)  out <- gc_ds(out, value = FALSE)  out <- gc_ds(out, value = TRUE)  out <- lapply(1:3, function(rep) {   out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data)   out })  out <- gc_ds(out, value = FALSE)

title: Manage simulated outputs in the per-session temporary directory — list_temp
text: Functions inspecting cleaning package-managed parquet files tempdir(). list_temp() shows present; purge_temp() resets simulation file system. purge_temp() deletes package-managed files unconditionally clears ownership maps, resetting system clean state. intended use testing teardown session cleanup, routine usage.

code: list_temp(quietly = FALSE)  purge_temp(quietly = FALSE)

what: Move, rename, combine files in mrgsimsds objects — move_ds
title: Move, rename, combine files in mrgsimsds objects — move_ds
text: Use move_ds() change enclosing directory. rename_ds() keeps files place, changes file names. combine_ds() brings simulated data multiple backing file single file.

title: Move, rename, combine files in mrgsimsds objects — move_ds
text: move_ds() automatically updates gc flag based files end : files remain tempdir() keep gc = TRUE; files moved outside tempdir() get gc = FALSE, protecting automatic deletion. Neither rename_ds() combine_ds() changes gc flag neither changes file location. automatic adjustment skipped gc setting locked prior call gc_ds(). warning issued gc locked TRUE files land outside tempdir(). object (x) required underlying files order move, rename, combine . three functions modify x place file ownership stays x.

title: Move, rename, combine files in mrgsimsds objects — move_ds
code: move_ds(x, path, quietly = FALSE)  rename_ds(x, id)  combine_ds(x)

title: Move, rename, combine files in mrgsimsds objects — move_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object. path new directory location backing files. quietly FALSE, message printed potentially new location backing files move. id short name used create data set files simulated output.

title: Move, rename, combine files in mrgsimsds objects — move_ds
text: three functions return x invisibly. updated file list accessible via x$files.

title: Move, rename, combine files in mrgsimsds objects — move_ds
code: mod <- house_ds()  out <- lapply(1:3, \(x) { mrgsim_ds(mod, events = ev(amt = 100)) })  out <- reduce_ds(out)  out <- rename_ds(out, "new-name")  out$files #> [1] "/tmp/RtmpQLZKls/mrgsims-ds-new-name-1.parquet" #> [2] "/tmp/RtmpQLZKls/mrgsims-ds-new-name-2.parquet" #> [3] "/tmp/RtmpQLZKls/mrgsims-ds-new-name-3.parquet"  out <- combine_ds(out)  out$files #> [1] "/tmp/RtmpQLZKls/mrgsims-ds-19177a7db92f.parquet"

text: Runs mrgsolve::mrgsim() writes simulation output parquet file tempdir(), returning mrgsimsds object. Files tempdir() auto-deleted garbage collection default. Use move_ds() save_ds() relocate files outside tempdir(), automatically disables gc, call gc_ds() control gc directly. Note full argument names must used arguments.

Ownership of simulation files — ownership
text: Functions check ownership disown simulation output files disk. One situation need take ownership simulating parallel, simulation happens another R process. mrgsim.ds ownership established simulation returns mrgsimsds object created. happens another R process (e.g., worker node), way transfer information back parent process. case, call take_ownership() results returned parent process appropriate. Typically, results returned list call reduce_ds() create single object pointing owning multiple files. Therefore, rare call take_ownership() directly; , please make sure understand going .

title: Ownership of simulation files — ownership
code: ownership()  list_ownership(full.names = FALSE)  check_ownership(x)  disown(x)  take_ownership(x)

title: Ownership of simulation files — ownership
text: full.names TRUE, include directory path listing file ownership. x mrgsimsds object.

title: Ownership of simulation files — ownership
text: check_ownership: TRUE x owns underlying files; FALSE otherwise. list_ownership: data.frame ownership information. ownership: nothing; used side effects. disown: x returned invisibly; modified. take_ownership: x returned invisibly hash package-level ownership maps updated place.

title: Ownership of simulation files — ownership
code: mod <- house_ds()  out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, id = 1)  check_ownership(out) #> [1] TRUE  ownership() #> > Objects: 5 | Files: 5 | Size: 385.7 Kb  list_ownership() #>                              file        address #> 1 mrgsims-ds-19173e2de442.parquet 0x55ad63cb1060 #> 2 mrgsims-ds-19174e9d507b.parquet 0x55ad640ff968 #> 3  mrgsims-ds-19177aa7a80.parquet 0x55ad63eb2df8 #> 4 mrgsims-ds-1917424a1f3a.parquet 0x55ad58617c88 #> 5  mrgsims-ds-1917c09c419.parquet 0x55ad634ebe70  e1 <- ev(amt = 100) e2 <- ev(amt = 200)  out <- list(mrgsim_ds(mod, e1), mrgsim_ds(mod, e2))  sims <- reduce_ds(out)  ownership() #> > Objects: 6 | Files: 7 | Size: 439 Kb  check_ownership(sims) #> [1] TRUE  check_ownership(out[[1]]) #> [1] FALSE  check_ownership(out[[2]]) #> [1] FALSE

code: mod <- modlib_ds("popex", outvars = "IPRED") #> Loading model from cache.  data <- ev_expand(amt = 100, ID = 1:10)  out <- lapply(1:3, function(rep) {   out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data)    out })  length(out) #> [1] 3  sims <- reduce_ds(out)  sims #> Model: popex #> Dim  : 14,460 x 3 #> Files: 3 [161.7 Kb] #> Owner: yes (gc) #>     ID time     IPRED #> 1:   1  0.0 0.0000000 #> 2:   1  0.0 0.0000000 #> 3:   1  0.5 0.8629376 #> 4:   1  1.0 1.5462311 #> 5:   1  1.5 2.0850748 #> 6:   1  2.0 2.5077949 #> 7:   1  2.5 2.8371897 #> 8:   1  3.0 3.0916080  check_ownership(sims) #> [1] TRUE  lapply(out, check_ownership) #> [[1]] #> [1] FALSE #>  #> [[2]] #> [1] FALSE #>  #> [[3]] #> [1] FALSE #>

title: Refresh 'Arrow' dataset pointers — refresh_ds

what: Save and restore an mrgsimsds object — save_ds
title: Save and restore an mrgsimsds object — save_ds
text: save_ds() serializes mrgsimsds object .rds file, moving backing parquet files directory file. Parquet filenames stored bare basenames inside .rds, .rds file parquet files must stay directory portable. restore file readRDS(); use read_ds() instead. read_ds() deserializes file written save_ds(), rebuilds Arrow Dataset pointer, transfers full ownership backing files returned object.

title: Save and restore an mrgsimsds object — save_ds
code: save_ds(x, file, quietly = FALSE)  read_ds(file)

title: Save and restore an mrgsimsds object — save_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object. file save_ds(), path output .rds file; directory component determines backing parquet files moved. read_ds(), path .rds file written save_ds(). quietly FALSE, message printed potentially new location backing files move.

title: Save and restore an mrgsimsds object — save_ds
text: save_ds() returns path written .rds file, invisibly. read_ds() returns restored mrgsimsds object invisibly. gc disabled (gc = FALSE) returned object caller holds ownership backing files.

title: Save and restore an mrgsimsds object — save_ds
code: mod <- house_ds()  out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, events = ev(amt = 100))  file <- save_ds(out, file.path(tempdir(), "out.rds")) #> Warning: object and backing files will be saved to tempdir().  out2 <- read_ds(file)
